title: Fauna Query
description: Represents the request and response structures for executing Fauna Query Language (FQL) v10 queries via the Core HTTP API /query/1 endpoint. Includes the query request body, successful response format, and error response format.

query.description: The FQL v10 query string to execute against the Fauna database.

arguments.description: Named arguments to pass to the query. These are available as variables within the FQL query and provide a safe way to inject values without string interpolation.

data.description: The query result data. The structure depends on the query executed and the X-Format header value (tagged or simple).

static_type.description: The static type of the query result as determined by Fauna's type system.

txn_ts.description: Transaction timestamp in microseconds since the Unix epoch.

schema_version.description: The schema version at the time the query was executed.

summary.description: Optional summary information about the query execution.

query_tags.description: Tags associated with the query for logging and monitoring purposes.

ErrorResponse.description: Error response from the /query/1 endpoint. Contains an error object instead of data.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. Fauna error codes are part of the API contract and are safe to write programmatic logic against.

message.description: Human-readable error message describing the failure.

constraint_failures.description: Details about check or unique constraint failures when the error code is constraint_failure.

summary.description: Detailed error information including the location of the error in the query.

txn_ts.description: Transaction timestamp of the failed request.

schema_version.description: Schema version at the time of the failed request.

QueryStats.description: Operational statistics for query execution including compute, read, and write operations consumed.

compute_ops.description: Number of Transactional Compute Operations consumed by the query.

read_ops.description: Number of Transactional Read Operations consumed.

write_ops.description: Number of Transactional Write Operations consumed.

contention_retries.description: Number of times the transaction was retried due to contention.

storage_bytes_read.description: Number of bytes read from storage.

storage_bytes_write.description: Number of bytes written to storage.

rate_limits_hit.description: List of rate limits that were hit during query execution.

ConstraintFailure.description: Details about a specific check or unique constraint failure.

paths.description: Field paths that triggered the constraint failure.

message.description: Description of the constraint that was violated.
